title: Self Introduction
content: I am a software engineer with 5 years of experience in backend development, specializing in distributed systems and API design. I have worked on financial systems and e-commerce platforms, and I am passionate about building scalable, reliable software.

title: Why do you want to join our company?
content: I have been following your company's product development and I am impressed by your engineering culture. I believe my backend experience can contribute to your team while I continue to grow in system design and product development.

title: What are your strengths?
content: My strengths include strong system design skills, experience with high-traffic distributed systems, and the ability to quickly understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

title: What are your weaknesses?
content: I sometimes spend too much time optimizing code for edge cases. I have been working on better prioritization by focusing on delivering value first and iterating on improvements.

title: Career goals
content: In the near term, I want to deepen my expertise in system architecture. Long term, I aim to grow into a technical lead role where I can mentor other engineers and drive architectural decisions.
